meta.title: Defense Will Win (In ICS / SCADA Security)
meta.description:
It is taken as gospel that offense has the advantage in cyber conflict and that this is a permanent condition. Dale Peterson of Digital Bond makes the case that Defense Will Win in ICS cyber conflict at S4xEurope.

The session looks at conflict from a historical perspective, the definition of an offensive cyber success in ICS, the danger of offensive predominance, and the advantages of even an adversary improving their ICS cyber defense.
